Name: Adit Sahai
Desciption:
Adit Sahai is the author of “The Mystery of Bermuda Triangle”, and "Space and Time: The Cosmic Reality".  
Adit likes to watch and play a variety of sports like Football, Tennis, Badminton, but Cricket stands out amongst all. His favorite player in the sport is his idol Virat Kohli, reflecting his love towards Kohli’s contribution to the game and the nation.  
Since childhood, Adit has had a fond of Space, and the depths of the Universe. In the future, he aspires to work in the field of Astronomy, and become an Astronomer, to fulfill his dream of exploring, discovering and learning about the depths of deep outer space.  
Apart from Astronomy, Adit has various hobbies, which keep him busy throughout the day. He likes to solve the Rubik’s Cube, play the Piano and primarily Guitar, learning old Bollywood songs, along the way.  
Writing has been one aspect of Adit’s life, which has defined his character. He hopes to keep this skill alive for as long as he can, and write lots of more books along the way.
